ground_truth.title: Training - Anytime Fitness
ground_truth.main_content: Empower your fitness journey with AF TRAINING. Take your fitness journey to the next level with personalized training support, guidance, and technology. Whether you're a seasoned gym-goer or just getting started, Anytime Fitness offers coaching expertise personalized to your goals. The Anytime Fitness App is like having a Coach in your pocket, and AF Coach-led personal training options provide hands-on support to accelerate your progress. Personal Trainers Boost Success by 30% according to the Journal of Sports Science & Medicine. Get Started with a Free Fitness Consultation where an expert AF Coach will discuss your goals and use the Evolt body composition scanner to establish your baseline, then create a personalized plan for training, nutrition, and recovery. AF Training delivers safe, effective, and sustainable results built on 4 key pillars: Strength + Cardiovascular Training optimizes performance; Functional Fitness Enhances Mobility & Balance; Workout Variety Boosts Confidence & Outcomes; and Interconnected Technology Assess & Track Progress using the Evolt 360 body composition scanner and Anytime Fitness App. Training options include the Anytime Fitness App with personalized support, Dynamic Group Training Options for motivation from group settings, and Customized 1:1 Personal Training Programs with dedicated AF Coaches. Anytime Fitness partners with the National Academy of Sports Medicine (NASM) to validate their science-based approach. Member success stories include Luis who lost 75 pounds, Molly who overcame gym anxiety, and James who triumphed over cancer.
with: Empower your fitness journey with AF TRAINING. Take your fitness journey to the next level with personalized training support, guidance, and technology.
Working with a personal trainer (aka an AF Coach) can increase the success of reaching your fitness goals by more than 30% according to the Journal of Sports Science & Medicine.
In this 1-on-1 session, an expert AF Coach will discuss your goals and use the Evolt body composition scanner to establish your baseline.
By combining resistance training with cardio, AF Training improves your strength, performance, and energy levels.
Luis has lost 75 pounds since joining AF, but his transformation was more than physical.
